pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-021 (AI and Machine Learning/Task) scores 0.431 composite (highest: O*NET at 0.431) and is edge_case for the Data Engineer role. The KSA is an edge case for AI and Machine Learning but contains 0 DE pattern signals sufficient to warrant inclusion for a senior IC data engineer. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, O*NET signal (0.431), and AI and Machine Learning handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI/ML (AI) competencies for Data Engineer IC/senior IC, or does this belong to ML Engineering?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI/ML engineering overlap appears in 30-40% of senior DE postings: feature engineering, ML pipelines, data prep for training. Governance/ethics framing (DE signals=0, OOS signals=0) shifts the boundary toward MLOps or AI governance roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content skews governance/strategy. Not market-supported at IC/senior IC DE level. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content skews governance/strategy. Not market-supported at IC/senior IC DE level. Final decision: exclude.
